title: Outreach
doc_html:
§3207. Outreach

            The department shall work in cooperation with the Louisiana Department of Veterans Affairs for outreach to regional economic development organizations, local economic development organizations, and chambers of commerce throughout the state. The cooperation shall serve to encourage business owners who are veterans to seek certification as part of The Veterans First Business Initiative and to promote veteran-owned businesses that have been certified pursuant to the provisions of this Chapter.

            Acts 2019, No. 160, §1.
doc_text:
§3207.  Outreach
The department shall work in cooperation with the Louisiana Department of Veterans
Affairs for outreach to regional economic development organizations, local economic
development organizations, and chambers of commerce throughout the state.  The
cooperation shall serve to encourage business owners who are veterans to seek certification
as part of The Veterans First Business Initiative and to promote veteran-owned businesses
that have been certified pursuant to the provisions of this Chapter.
Acts 2019, No. 160, §1.
